subcodes.first_line: He maketh mention of His loved ones as He pleaseth and adorneth them with the ornament of grace and bounty. Verily, He doeth whatsoever He willeth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یذکر اولیائه کیف یشاء و یزینهم بطراز العنایه و العطاء انه هو فعال لما یشاء لم
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @living waters; water of life, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
